outcome_contract.why: The #new-ideas and #in-progress sections need to be separate pages so each can be focused, navigated to directly, and not compete for vertical space.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: #new-ideas and #in-progress each live at their own URL; navigation links point to each; root /process-improvements redirects or shows a landing.

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Single page with two major sections separated by scroll; anchor links in hero
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Hero anchor links break after split; sub-nav or updated links needed

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Shared filter state, shared pendingState, shared bulkSelection across both sections
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Split breaks shared filter UX; each page needs independent filter state

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Admin-only page, auth check on API routes
Auto-refresh endpoint returns all data in one payload
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Each sub-page will fetch only relevant subset; endpoint usable as-is (pages ignore unused fields)

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Single internal operator user; no perf budget

engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Rollback: revert PR; forward: redirect root route or keep as landing

open_operator_questions: Should the In Progress page retain the business filter dropdown, or is it not needed when the page is dedicated to that section only?

stage_payload.scope_summary: The `/process-improvements` page currently renders all sections on a single page: In Progress, New Ideas, Deferred, and Recently Actioned. The operator wants `#in-progress` and `#new-ideas` split into separate pages — each with its own URL, independent data load, and focused chrome. The monolithic `ProcessImprovementsInbox` client component (~1,750 lines) holds all state and all section renders in one unit; it must be decomposed.
goals: `/process-improvements/in-progress` — dedicated page for active plan monitoring
`/process-improvements/new-ideas` — dedicated page for queue triage (WorkItems + Deferred + Recently Actioned)
Navigation links in `NavigationHeader` (or a sub-nav) point to the new routes
Root `/process-improvements` becomes a redirect or a minimal landing page
non_goals: Changing the API routes or data model
Adding new sections or features during the split
Changing the Deferred or Recently Actioned sections (they stay with New Ideas or can follow later)
Redesigning the visual style of either page
constraints: No new API routes required — existing `/api/process-improvements/items` and decision routes are sufficient
No i18n — English-only internal tool (confirmed in memory)
`ProcessImprovementsInbox.test.tsx` tests must continue to pass after the split
assumptions: Deferred and Recently Actioned sections stay with the New Ideas page (they are downstream of triage)
The `ProcessImprovementsSummary` pill row either becomes page-scoped or is dropped per page
Auto-refresh can stay on both pages independently (30s poll, same endpoint)
`BulkActionBar` stays on the New Ideas page (bulk select only applies to queue items)
key_entry_points: `apps/business-os/src/app/process-improvements/page.tsx` — server component, data fetching entry point

rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: None — no sub-routes today; new `page.tsx` files needed
None — all private sub-components identified and role-mapped
None — 5 shared state items documented; all break cleanly at page boundary
None — server fns can be called independently; auto-refresh endpoint reusable
None — `NavigationHeader.tsx:41` is the sole nav entry; anchor links in hero also need update
Advisory: `ProcessImprovementsInbox.test.tsx` renders the full monolith; will need to follow decomposed components

process_topology.trigger: Operator visits `/process-improvements` or clicks the nav link
process_topology.end_condition: Operator sees both In Progress section and New Ideas section on the same scrollable page

areas.label: Page load
areas.flow: Server component fetches 3 data sources → passes all as `initialXxx` props to `ProcessImprovementsInbox`

areas.label: In Progress rendering
areas.issues: Renders `null` when no plans — no empty state

areas.label: Anchor navigation
areas.flow: Hero header stat tiles are `<a href="#in-progress">` and `<a href="#new-ideas">` — fragment-only, same page
areas.issues: Will break when sections are on separate pages

areas.label: Auto-refresh
areas.issues: Returns all 4 data types regardless of which section is displayed
